title: Umami Air-Popped Pork Tenderloin
description: A light Syrian-inspired dish featuring air-fried pork tenderloin with umami flavors that are both chewy and paleo-friendly.
instructions: Trim any excess fat from the pork tenderloin.
Cut the tenderloin into bite-sized chunks if desired for a more snackable size.
Season both sides of the meat with umami seasoning mix, salt, and pepper evenly.
Place the seasoned tenderloin in the air fryer basket. Cook for 12-15 minutes or until fully cooked through (internal temperature reaches at least 145°F).
Let rest for a few minutes before serving.
